---
title: "Program PI Detail"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/piid-project-detail.json"), Path("../data/piid-project-detail.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/piid-project-detail.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report piid-project-detail"
    )

d              = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group          = d["group"]
project_labels = d["project_labels"]
pis            = d["pis"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>One section per Program Increment. Each row is a project workstream.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not pis:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No PIID labels found. Ensure epics carry <code>PIID::</code> labels.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for pi in pis:
        pi_str  = f"{pi['pct_pi']}%" if pi["pct_pi"] is not None else "—"
        date_r  = ""
        if pi["start"] and pi["end"]:
            date_r = f" &nbsp;·&nbsp; {pi['start']} → {pi['end']}"
        html += (
            f'<h3>{pi["phase_icon"]} {pi["piid"]} — {pi["phase"]}'
            f'<small style="font-weight:normal;font-size:0.75em">{date_r} &nbsp;·&nbsp; PI elapsed: {pi_str}</small></h3>'
            '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
            "<thead><tr>"
            "<th>Project</th><th>Epics (open/total)</th><th>% Done</th>"
            "<th>Status</th><th>Planned</th><th>Actual</th><th>Δ</th><th>Blocked</th>"
            "</tr></thead><tbody>"
        )
        for proj in pi["projects"]:
            if proj["has_data"]:
                delta  = proj["delta"]
                d_str  = f"▲{delta}" if delta > 0 else (f"▼{abs(delta)}" if delta < 0 else "=")
                blk    = str(proj["blocked"]) if proj["blocked"] else "—"
                name   = f'<a href="{proj["board_url"]}" target="_blank">{proj["project"]}</a>' if proj["board_url"] else proj["project"]
                html  += (
                    f"<tr>"
                    f"<td><strong>{name}</strong></td>"
                    f"<td>{proj['open']}/{proj['total']}</td>"
                    f"<td>{proj['avg_pct']}%</td>"
                    f"<td>{proj['status']}</td>"
                    f"<td>{proj['planned']} pt</td>"
                    f"<td>{proj['actual']} pt</td>"
                    f"<td>{d_str}</td>"
                    f"<td>{blk}</td>"
                    f"</tr>"
                )
            else:
                html += (
                    f'<tr><td><strong>{proj["project"]}</strong></td>'
                    '<td colspan="7" style="color:#999">—</td></tr>'
                )
        html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Status | Condition |
|------|--------|-----------|
| ✅ On Track | Current PI | % Done ≥ % of PI quarter elapsed |
| ⚠️ At Risk | Current PI | % Done < % of PI quarter elapsed |
| ✅ Complete | Past PI | % Done = 100% |
| ❌ Incomplete | Past PI | % Done < 100% at PI end |
| 🔵 Planned | Future PI | PI has not yet started |

- **% Done** — weighted average completion (weighted by planned weight)
- **Planned** — sum of planned weights set on epics
- **Actual** — sum of story-point weights on linked issues
- **Δ** — ▲ actual exceeds planned · ▼ actual below planned · = matched
- **Blocked** — number of epics with at least one active blocker
:::
